calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER ANDREW EMIL ARMSTRONG'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Change of Name, Andrew Emil Armstrong.

Dept. 505; Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:40 p.m., and concluded at 1:41 p.m. (D505)

Petitioner Andrew Emil Armstrong appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Proof of service filed August 31, 2023.

The Court finds:
Petitioner has adequately satisfied the requirements of the Court.

The Court grants the Change of Names as follows:

Andrew Emil Armstrong
(First) (Mid) (Last)

Decree changing name signed and filed this date.

HEARING ON PETITIONER ANDREW EMIL ARMSTRONG'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Continued To Sep-08-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for Change of name.

Dept. 505; Judge Christopher C Hite; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:49 p.m. and concluding at 2:04 p.m.

Petitioner Andrew Emil Armstrong appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petitioner Submits the following for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Proof of service of Notice of Change of Name.............ID/EVID

The Court hears testimony, reviewed all evidence and the Court finds that there is insufficient statutory proof filed with the Court.

Petitioner is to file a signed declaration of the person served from the Department of Corrections confirming the receipt of Name Change documents with the Court.

Good cause appearing, the Court continues this matter to September 8, 2023 at 1:30 pm in Dept 505. (D505)

HEARING ON PETITIONER ANDREW EMIL ARMSTRONG'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Continued To Sep-01-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on Calendar this day for hearing on Change of Name.

Dept. 505; Judge Christopher Hite; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:00 p.m.; and concluded at 2:10 p.m.

Petitioner Andrew Emil Armstrong appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

The petitioner submits the following for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: signed document....ID/EVID

The Court heard the testimony, reviewed all evidence and the Court finds that there is insufficient statutory proof filed with the Court.

The petitioner is to file proof of personal service and a signed declaration of the person served from the Department of Corrections confirming the receipt of name change documents with the Court.

Good cause appearing, the Court continues this matter to September 1, 2023, at 1:30 pm in Department 505.

HEARING ON PETITIONER ANDREW EMIL ARMSTRONG'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Petitioner Andrew Armstrong's Petition for Change of Name.

Dept. 505; Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: N Webb. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:51 pm and concluding at 1:58 pm.

Petitioner Andrew Armstrong is present in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.

The Court Finds:
Petitioner has not submitted a copy of the Request for Change of Name to the Department of Corrections as is required by law.

The Court Continues the matter to August 30, 2023 at 1:30 pm to allow Petitioner time to submit the documents to the Department of Corrections and obtain a confirmation from petitioners parole officer. (D505)
